Layout.ogImageAlt: Story Events — catering and event staffing

LandingPage.metaTitle: Story Events — Exceptional staff for your receptions
LandingPage.metaDescription: Story Events provides qualified teams — maîtres d’hôtel, servers — for caterers: weddings, ceremonies, conferences. B2B partnership, discretion, and service excellence.

HeroMinimal.taglineExtension: maîtres d’hôtel teams and bespoke service for your events, with no compromise on your brand’s image.

LandingOffer.title: Your service subcontractor, at your brand’s level
LandingOffer.intro: When you sign a wedding, ceremony, or conference, front-of-house service carries your reputation. Story Events builds trained teams — maîtres d’hôtel, servers — who extend your catering standards, with discretion and impeccable presentation.
LandingOffer.cardB2bBody: We work with catering and event businesses: you keep the client relationship, we deploy staff to your briefs.
LandingOffer.cardQualityBody: Selective recruitment, dress code aligned with your brand, attitude suited to high-end service. A dedicated contact to align headcount and flow.
LandingOffer.cardReactivityBody: Weddings, corporate cocktails, seminars, galas: we staff teams to your schedule and volume constraints.

LandingRoles.title: Roles & positions
LandingRoles.itemHostsDesc: service coordination, guest welcome, protocol compliance.
LandingRoles.itemServersDesc: setup, plated or French-style service, bar support if needed.
LandingRoles.itemReinforcementsDesc: peak periods, large formats, multi-site events.

LandingContact.title: Discuss a partnership
LandingContact.intro: Tell us about your usual formats and requirements: we’ll get back to you with a staffing proposal and a clear framework for your upcoming events.
